channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large deep pothole, 5th April
item.description:
This pothole is getting larger week by week and it's very deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15 by 3 foot pane of plastic blocking pavement and part of road, 5th April
item.description:
This has been here since Saturday morning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
Fridge dumped on pavement, blocking access for wheelchair users and parents with prams and is dangerous because of the nature of the product

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London

item.title: Callcott, 5th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Street light, 5th April
item.description:
Street light on during daylight hours
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.description:
Rubbish from EV chargers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London

item.title: Hazelmere, 5th April
item.description:
Bagged waste and items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Cover missing, 5th April
item.description:
Might be an overflow for the river shuttle, looks like it's broken and fallen in.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken mirror with glass around in footpath, 5th April
item.description:
Broken mirror dumped by litter bin with shards of glass on footpath. Dangerous to children and dogs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Village Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rubbish, furniture, rats!!!, 5th April
item.description:
Dumped furniture left, seen rats a few times, health and safety risk!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trowbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley thrown into bushes, 5th April
item.description:
///vent.button.clever

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Osulton Way, 5th April
item.description:
This road is full of potholes from top to bottom. This one stands out and it can't be avoided easily. It would be good if the team from the council inspect the entire road instead of fixing just 1-2 potholes and ignoring the remaining 50.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ossulton Way, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant issue with rubbish on Grove Lane, 5th April
item.description:
This is the daily state of gutters and sidewalk outside 4-8 Grove Lane, due largely in part to the green bin left outside 8 Grove Lane that is subject to flytipping. We sweep the gutters daily and every day return to this mess. Please sort this problem out once and for all Southwark Council!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree blocking pavement and driveway of house, 5th April
item.description:
Tree has fallen obstructing the public pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Torrington Park, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pieces of fly tipping, 5th April
item.description:
More fly tipping on the estate that I live in. It’s becoming a real problem. We’d really appreciate if you could collect but also maybe put signs up. It makes the area look so horrible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal flying flag on public property, 5th April
item.description:
There is a flag posted on a public street lamp that has not been addressed for months. It is located at the joining of Farwell Road and Bexley Lane. It should be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farwell Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge series of deep potholes, 5th April
item.description:
Cluster of large deep potholes Along main road Dangerously deep and large
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pieces of rubbish, 5th April
item.description:
Someone has left pieces of furniture and rubbish on the side of the street. It continues to happen in this area on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
This vehicle has been there several weeks & is on false registration plates. Now children, drug addicts are starting to tamper with it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
